name: 骷髅匕首（★） | 多普勒
descriptionEn: This skeletonized-tang knife has been taped at the handle for improved grip. The hole allows a finger to be threaded through for stability and safety. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated. Getting lost in its color can prove fatal
descriptionZh: 这把镂空的匕首被绑在握把上以提升握感。刀身上的空洞允许手指伸过以提升稳定性与安全性。 这把武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料画上的仿大理石纹进行了涂装，并且外表裹上了糖衣。 被其外表所迷惑后果会很严重
